jobs.description: Reads from CREW_WSTELE_LND landing zone table and populates TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE table in the Crew Data Warehouse.

parameters.name: $APT_STRING_PADCHAR
parameters.description: Pad character used when padding a string to fixed length

data_flow_summary.source: WSTELE_LND_TDC reads from Teradata table CREW_WSTELE_LND
data_flow_summary.split: SEPARATE_PHTYPE_TFM fans out to 6 branches by phone type
branches: BASIC_TYPE_TFM    → BASIC_TYPE_PVT (pivot 5 fields) → BASIC_REC_TFM → HOME_BASIC_JNR → NEW_PRTY_TFM → ALL_REC_FNL
HOME_TYPE_CPY     → HOME_CPY (copy×3) → HOME_SEQ1/2/3_PVT → HOME_SEQ_FNL → INC_PRTY_TFM → HOME_BASIC_JNR → NEW_PRTY_TFM → ALL_REC_FNL
AWAY_TYPE_CPY     → AWAY_CPY → AWAY_SEQ1/2/3_PVT → AWAY_SEQ_FNL → AWAY_BASIC_JNR → (priority calc) → ALL_REC_FNL
data_flow_summary.merge: ALL_REC_FNL funnels 7 streams → NULL_VAL_TFM (final validation) → TE_EMPLOYEE_PHONE_DW

processing_order.note: Single parallel job — process independently for lineage extraction and code generation
